name: Current Time / JavaScript
description: My very first project, it shows the system time on a 12h format with a toggle button for 24h, followed by a greet, changing the page elements accordingly

name: Shady Shader / JavaScript
description: A simple color randomizer that display curated colors via user input, placing them in background. This is my first project to consume an API.

name: Shady Shader / React.js
description: This React.js application takes the user through a curated color pool paired with their respective playful names, all provided by an external API. The selected colors will be applied to the background as a gradient, the user is free to randomize each color individually.
